objectives: Evaluate test coverage and quality for the OpenRouter Rust client library
Identify and fill gaps: embed_batch index ordering, deleted integration tests, key info coverage, embeddings coverage, wiremock gaps, quality/maintainability issues
constraints: No breaking changes to existing tests
All tests must pass before closing session
important_facts: Test count before: 280 unit + 23 doc = 303 total
Test count after: 341 unit + 23 doc = 364 total (+61 new unit tests)
EmbeddingResponse derives only Deserialize, not Serialize — affects roundtrip testing approach
MessageContent is an enum (Text | Parts), not a String — cannot use .as_deref() on Option<MessageContent>
StreamDelta.content is Option<MessageContent> — match on enum variant required in tests
embed_batch() sorts data by index before returning — critical correctness invariant, was untested
Retry-After header parsing was unit-tested in isolation but never exercised end-to-end with wiremock
streaming_backpressure.rs and retry_retry_after.rs were deleted and not replaced with equivalent wiremock tests
~30 tests duplicated between completion.rs/completion_tests.rs and web_search.rs/web_search_tests.rs
futures crate is in main [dependencies], not dev-dependencies — usable in #[cfg(test)] blocks
decisions_made: Added embeddings_tests.rs (17 tests): pure unit tests covering index ordering, edge cases, serde
Added key_info_tests.rs (21 tests): type convenience methods + 4 wiremock integration tests
Added retry_and_streaming_tests.rs (23 tests): retry-after e2e, non-retry passthrough, SSE streaming wiremock
Did not remove duplicated validation tests — risk of removing context from existing test files outweighs test count benefit
Did not add embed_text wiremock test — embed_text delegates to create(), which is already wiremock-tested
artifacts: src/tests/mod.rs (updated to wire in 3 new modules)
dependencies: futures = 0.3 (in main dependencies, usable in tests)
risks_issues: Test duplication in validation suite (~30 tests): not a correctness issue but inflates count and causes confusion — recommend consolidating completion_tests.rs into completion.rs in a follow-up
Retry-After timing test uses 600ms lower bound — could be flaky on extremely slow CI; consider making it configurable or removing timing assertion if it causes CI noise

streaming wiremock test sends full SSE body as a string — wiremock's ResponseTemplate does not stream slowly, so backpressure semaphore is not exercised; true backpressure testing requires a slow mock server

iteration.summary: Performed a full test coverage audit of the OpenRouter Rust client library. Identified 6 gap areas from the task brief and added 61 new unit/integration tests across 3 new files. All 341 tests pass with zero warnings. The critical embed_batch index-ordering invariant, Retry-After end-to-end behavior, key info wiremock coverage, and streaming wiremock coverage were all gaps — now addressed. Duplicate test coverage in the validation module (~30 redundant tests) was identified and documented as tech debt but not removed in this session.
next_actions: Add wiremock test for true streaming backpressure using delayed mock responses
Add wiremock test for Retry-After HTTP-date format (not just delta-seconds)
Implement list_embedding_models endpoint (item 24) and add tests
Implement models listing and credits endpoints (item 9)
